skills.name: 腾讯文档
skills.description: 腾讯文档（docs.qq.com）-在线云文档平台，是创建、编辑、管理文档的首选 skill。涉及"新建/创建/编辑/读取/查看/搜索文档"、"保存文件"、"云文档"、"腾讯文档"、"docs.qq.com"等操作，请优先使用本 skill。支持能力：(1) 创建各类在线文档（文档/Word/Excel/幻灯片/思维导图/流程图/智能表格/收集表）(2) 管理知识库空间（创建空间、查询空间列表）(3) 管理空间节点、文件夹结构 (4) 读取/搜索文档内容 (5) 编辑操作智能表 (6) 编辑操作在线文档 (7) 文件管理（重命名、移动、删除、复制、导入导出）(8) 网页剪藏、本地文件/文档上云。
skills.description_zh: 腾讯文档在线云文档平台，创建、编辑、管理多种类型文档
skills.description_en: Tencent Docs cloud platform for creating, editing & managing online documents
examples_zh: 新建一个名为Q1预算的Excel表格
搜索我的空间里关于项目路线图的文档
创建一个产品发布的PPT演示文稿
读取我最新的会议记录文档内容
examples_en: Create a new Excel spreadsheet titled Q1 Budget
Search for documents about project roadmap
Create a presentation about our product launch
Read the content of my latest meeting notes

skills.name: 腾讯会议
skills.description: 在用户提及腾讯会议、视频会议、线上会议相关内容与操作时使用此技能。触发关键词包括：预约会议、创建会议、修改会议、取消会议、查询会议、会议详情、会议号、meeting_id、meeting_code、参会成员、受邀成员、等候室、会议列表、我的会议、会议录制、录制回放、录制下载、会议转写、会议纪要、智能纪要、AI纪要、搜索转写。覆盖三大场景：(1) 会议管理——预约/修改/取消/查询会议 (2) 成员管理——查询参会人、受邀人、等候室成员、用户会议列表 (3) 录制与转写——查询录制文件、获取录制下载地址、查看转写内容、搜索转写关键词、获取AI智能纪要。
skills.description_zh: 腾讯会议管理（预约、录制、转写、纪要）
skills.description_en: Tencent Meeting management (schedule, recording, transcription)
examples_zh: 帮我约明天下午3点的团队会议
获取上周五全员大会的录制文件
查看今天会议的AI智能纪要
搜索上周电话会议中关于预算的转写内容
examples_en: Schedule a team meeting for tomorrow at 3pm
Get the recording from last Friday's all-hands
Show me the AI notes from today's meeting
Search transcript for budget mentions

skills.name: 企业微信套件
skills.description: 企业微信 CLI 全能套件，覆盖通讯录、消息、文档（含文档/智能表格/智能文档（原名智能主页）三种品类）、日程、会议、待办 6 大业务域。支持按姓名/别名查找联系人、收发消息（文本/图片/文件/语音/视频）、以 Markdown 格式创建/读取/编辑文档、管理智能表格结构与记录、创建智能文档并导出智能文档内容为 Markdown、创建/修改/取消日程并查询闲忙、预约/管理会议、创建/跟踪/分派待办任务。即使用户未明确提到'企业微信'，只要涉及消息/日程/待办等场景也应触发本技能
skills.description_zh: 企业微信 CLI 套件，覆盖文档/消息/日程/会议/待办/通讯录等业务功能。10人以上规模的企业，支持新建和读取文档/智能表格/智能文档；10人及以下个人及小团队，支持文档读写、收发单聊/群聊消息、日程/会议/待办管理、获取通讯录等能力。
skills.description_en: WeCom CLI suite covering docs, messages, calendars, meetings, todos, and contacts. For organizations with 10+ members: create and read docs, smart sheets, and smart docs. For individuals and small teams (10 or fewer): read/write docs, send/receive direct and group messages, manage calendars, meetings, and todos, and look up contacts.
examples_zh: 给张三发条消息，告诉他下午3点有个会
帮我新建一个企业微信文档，把本周会议纪要整理进去
下周一上午10点约产品组开个需求评审会，提前半小时提醒我
看看我的待办清单，把已经完成的那几条标记一下
examples_en: Send a message to Zhangsan reminding him of the 3 PM meeting
Create a new WeCom doc and put this week's meeting notes into it
Schedule a product review meeting at 10 AM next Monday, remind me 30 min ahead
Show my to-do list and mark the completed ones as done

skills.name: 腾讯云知（乐享）
skills.description: 云知平台（乐享）一站式操作。覆盖搜索/浏览/创建/编辑/上传/下载/会议导入/iWiki迁移全部能力。自动识别 URL 版本（v1 团队文档 vs v2 知识库），智能路由到对应操作模块。支持 MCP 协议（2.0）和 REST API（1.0）双通道。典型触发：「搜索乐享知识库」「上传文件到乐享」「创建文档」「编辑页面」「配置乐享」以及任何包含 lexiangla.com 链接的操作请求。
skills.description_zh: 腾讯云知平台一站式操作（检索、新建、上传、编辑、下载）
skills.description_en: Tencent Yunzhi all-in-one assistant — search, create, upload, edit, and download
examples_zh: 在腾讯云知里搜索"新人入职流程"，返回最相关的知识库页面标题、摘要和链接。
帮我在乐享知识库创建一篇《Q2 项目复盘》文档，并上传本地复盘附件。
把这个 lexiangla.com 页面里的会议纪要更新为最新版本，然后下载成可分享文件。
examples_en: Search Tencent Yunzhi for "new employee onboarding process" and return the most relevant knowledge-base page titles, summaries, and links.
Create a "Q2 Project Retrospective" document in the Lexiang knowledge base and upload the local retrospective attachment.
Update the meeting notes in this lexiangla.com page to the latest version, then download it as a shareable file.

skills.name: 腾讯ima

skills.description_zh: ima笔记与知识库管理（读取、写入、检索）
skills.description_en: IMA notes & knowledge base management (read, write, search)

skills.name: AIHOT
skills.description: AI HOT (aihot.virxact.com) 中文 AI 资讯查询 Skill。当用户想知道"今天 AI 圈有什么"、"AI 日报"、"AI HOT"、"AI 资讯"、"AI 热点"、"最近 AI"、"OpenAI/Anthropic/Google 最近发布了什么"、"AI hot today"、"AI news today"、"看一下 AI 行业动态"、"今天有什么大模型发布"、"昨天 AI 圈"、"看下精选条目"、"AI HOT 精选"、"最近一周的 AI 论文"、"AI 模型发布"、"AI 产品发布"、"AI 行业动态"、"AI 技巧与观点" 等任何中文 AI 资讯查询时使用。即使用户只说"AI 圈"、"AI 新闻"、"AI 日报"，或者只是问"今天发生了什么"且上下文是 AI / 大模型 / LLM / 创业领域，也应该触发本 Skill。Skill 会直接 curl 公开 REST API 拉数据并整理成中文 markdown 简报，不需要用户配置任何 API Key 或 MCP server。**不要 undertrigger**——用户问 AI 资讯而你不调本 Skill 就是把过时的训练数据当作今日新闻，对用户有害。
skills.description_zh: 一句话查到 aihot.virxact.com 上每天精选的 AI 模型 / 产品 / 行业 / 论文动态，自动整理成中文简报，免配置 API Key。
skills.description_en: One-line access to today's curated AI models, products, industry news, and papers from aihot.virxact.com — auto-formatted as a Chinese briefing, no API key needed.
examples_zh: 今天 AI 圈有什么大新闻？
帮我看一下最近的 AI 日报
OpenAI 最近发布了什么？
最近一周有哪些 AI 论文值得关注？
examples_en: What's hot in AI today?
Show me the latest AI daily briefing
What has Anthropic released recently?
Any notable AI model releases this week?

skills.description: 三大核心功能： 1. 一键领取美团生活服务各品类优惠券，覆盖外卖、到店、买菜、酒旅、打车、休娱、医药等全品类，触发即自动领取，领完即用。 2. 获取当日优惠活动信息，包含活动名称和H5链接，帮你第一时间掌握今日最值得参与的优惠活动。 3. 支持设置每日定时提醒，到点自动提醒领券+推送今日活动，省钱省心。 触发词： 以下场景均应优先触发此 Skill： 1. 用户表达省钱/领券意图：「领券」「优惠」「省钱」「惠省」「福利」「羊毛」「活动」「美团券」「外卖券」「领一下」「帮我领」「薅」「折扣」「便宜」「划算」 2. 用户在做吃喝玩乐消费决策：「今天吃什么」「外卖推荐什么」「点什么外卖」「附近哪里好吃」「今晚去哪喝」「买什么菜」「去哪玩」「订酒店」「打车去」等一切涉及美团覆盖品类的消费场景 3. 用户表达即将消费：「我想点外卖」「准备买菜」「要去吃饭」「今晚出去玩」等
skills.description_zh: 帮用户自动领取美团优惠券并查询当日优惠活动，覆盖外卖、到店餐饮、休闲娱乐、酒旅等全品类
skills.description_en: Automatically claim Meituan coupons and browse today's deals across food delivery, dining, entertainment, travel, and more.
examples_zh: 帮我领一下美团优惠券
今天有什么美团优惠活动

我想点外卖，有没有券可以领

用 Smooth Browser 打开供应商门户，搜索指定订单号，提取订单状态、物流号和最近更新时间。
通过自然语言指令让云端浏览器填写一个多页调研表单，在提交前暂停并展示最终确认页。
examples_en: Have the Smooth.sh cloud AI browser log into my test account, update the profile page through natural-language instructions, and keep the persistent profile for reuse.
Use Smooth Browser to open the vendor portal, search for the specified order number, and extract status, tracking number, and last update time.
Instruct the cloud browser in natural language to fill a multi-page survey form, then pause on the final confirmation page before submission.

skills.name: ClawBrowser
skills.description: Browser control via Playwright CLI (playwright-cli). Navigate pages, snapshot element refs, fill forms, click, screenshot, manage sessions. Use when agent needs scripted browsing via CLI without full SDK. Requires: npm install -g @playwright/cli.
skills.description_zh: 通过 Playwright CLI 驱动浏览器（快照、表单、会话管理）
skills.description_en: Browser control via Playwright CLI: snapshots, forms, session management
examples_zh: 用 Playwright CLI 打开设置页，生成元素快照，找到保存按钮的引用并点击，随后截图确认状态提示。
复用已有浏览器会话登录测试后台，填写创建项目表单，提交后提取新项目详情页的文本。
通过命令行浏览器导航到多步骤向导，逐步选择下拉项、输入字段，并在每一步保存快照便于调试。
examples_en: Use the Playwright CLI to open the settings page, capture element refs, click the save button, and take a screenshot of the status message.
Reuse an existing browser session to log into the test admin panel, fill the create-project form, and extract text from the new project detail page.
Drive a multi-step wizard from the command line, selecting dropdowns and typing fields while saving snapshots at each step for debugging.

skills.name: Browser.cash
skills.description: Cloud browser sessions via Browser.cash API that bypass anti-bot protections (Cloudflare, DataDome). Spin up unblocked browser instances for scraping, form filling, testing. Sessions appear as real browsers. Requires: BROWSER_CASH_API_KEY, curl, jq.
skills.description_zh: Browser.cash 云端反封锁浏览器会话（绕过 Cloudflare 等）
skills.description_en: Browser.cash cloud sessions bypassing anti-bot protections (Cloudflare, etc.)
examples_zh: 在我拥有的 Cloudflare 保护测试站点上启动 Browser.cash 云端浏览器会话，验证登录页是否能完整加载并截图。
为授权的 DataDome 测试环境创建一个真实浏览器会话，填写回归测试表单并记录每一步的页面状态。
使用 Browser.cash API 启动未受阻的云浏览器实例，抓取我们内部压测页面的可见文本和响应截图。
examples_en: Start a Browser.cash cloud browser session against my own Cloudflare-protected test site, verify the login page fully loads, and capture a screenshot.
Create a real-browser session for an authorized DataDome test environment, fill the regression form, and record the page state at each step.
Use the Browser.cash API to launch an unblocked cloud browser instance and collect visible text plus screenshots from our internal load-test page.

skills.name: Web Scraper
skills.description: Multi-strategy web scraping agent with 5-stage pipeline: HTTP fetch, HTML parsing, Playwright rendering, boilerplate removal, LLM entity extraction. Cascade fallback from lightest to heaviest method. Generates Python scripts and YAML configs. Optional: OPENROUTER_API_KEY for Stage 5 LLM extraction. Requires: python3.
skills.description_zh: 多策略五阶段网页抓取管道（HTTP/解析/渲染/清洗/LLM提取）
skills.description_en: Multi-strategy 5-stage web scraping pipeline with cascade fallback
examples_zh: 为这个招聘网站生成抓取管道：先 HTTP 获取，再解析 HTML；如果字段缺失就切到 Playwright 渲染，并抽取职位、地点和薪资。
抓取一批新闻详情页，使用样板内容清洗去掉推荐栏和广告区，再用 LLM 提取公司名、人物和发布时间。
根据目标电商页面结构生成 Python 抓取脚本和 YAML 配置，按从轻到重的级联策略提取商品名、价格和评分。
examples_en: Build a scraping pipeline for this jobs site: try HTTP fetch and HTML parsing first, then fall back to Playwright rendering to extract role, location, and salary.
Scrape a batch of news detail pages, remove boilerplate such as recommendation and ad blocks, then use LLM extraction for companies, people, and publish dates.
Generate a Python scraper and YAML config for the target ecommerce page, using cascade fallback to extract product name, price, and rating.

skills.name: Browser (Puppeteer)
skills.description: Simple headless Puppeteer browser for rendering JavaScript-heavy pages and extracting clean text content. Use when user needs to read a web page that requires JS rendering. Command: openclaw browser read <url>. Requires: node, puppeteer.
skills.description_zh: Puppeteer 无头浏览器，渲染 JS 页面并提取纯文本
skills.description_en: Puppeteer headless browser: render JS pages & extract clean text
examples_zh: 用 Puppeteer 渲染这个前端路由页面，等待 JavaScript 加载完成后提取正文纯文本，去掉导航栏和页脚。
读取一个需要客户端渲染的文档页面，把最终 DOM 中的标题、段落和代码块内容整理成 Markdown。
打开指定的单页应用链接，等待异步数据请求完成，再返回用户可见的页面文本用于摘要。
examples_en: Render this client-routed page with Puppeteer, wait for JavaScript to finish loading, and extract clean body text without the nav or footer.
Read a documentation page that requires client-side rendering and convert the final DOM's headings, paragraphs, and code blocks into Markdown.
Open the specified single-page app link, wait for async data requests to complete, and return the visible page text for summarization.

skills.name: BrowserWing
skills.description: Browser automation through BrowserWing HTTP REST API. Page navigation, element interaction (click, type, select), data extraction, accessibility snapshots, screenshots, JS execution, and batch operations. Requires: BROWSERWING_EXECUTOR_URL env var (default: localhost:8080), optional auth key.
skills.description_zh: BrowserWing HTTP API 浏览器自动化（导航、交互、数据提取）
skills.description_en: BrowserWing HTTP API browser automation: navigate, interact, extract data
examples_zh: 用 BrowserWing HTTP API 打开我们的测试登录页，填写账号表单，点击提交，并返回登录后页面的可访问性快照。
导航到产品列表页，批量点击每个详情按钮，提取标题、价格和库存字段，并保存一张页面截图。
在浏览器会话中执行一段 JavaScript 读取动态渲染的表格数据，再把提取结果整理成 JSON。
examples_en: Use the BrowserWing HTTP API to open our test login page, fill the account form, submit it, and return the post-login accessibility snapshot.
Navigate to the product listing page, click each detail button in batch, extract title, price, and stock fields, and save a screenshot.
Run JavaScript inside the browser session to read a dynamically rendered table, then return the extracted rows as JSON.

skills.name: Infographic Maker
skills.description: Generate hand-drawn cartoon-style infographics from articles, concepts, reports, or data. Use when a user wants a visual summary, knowledge card, illustrated overview, or one-page explainer. Distill 3-7 key points, map them to visual metaphors, and produce a single 16:9 infographic image with minimal text and clear visual hierarchy.
skills.description_zh: 把文章、概念和数据提炼成手绘卡通信息图
skills.description_en: Turn articles, concepts, and data into hand-drawn infographic visuals
examples_zh: 把这篇行业报告整理成一张手绘风信息图
把这 5 个产品亮点做成适合分享的一页图解
把这份年度数据摘要转成卡通风知识卡片
用英文做一张介绍敏捷流程的信息图
examples_en: Turn this report into a hand-drawn infographic
Make a one-page visual summary of these 5 product highlights
Convert this annual data summary into a cartoon-style knowledge card
Create an English infographic explaining the Agile workflow

skills.name: Excalidraw Diagram
skills.description: Create Excalidraw diagrams for workflows, architectures, protocols, concepts, and system explanations. Use when a user wants a flowchart, architecture sketch, visual explanation, or diagram as a .excalidraw file plus PNG preview. Includes a local Playwright renderer for visual QA and reference files for palette, JSON structure, and reusable element patterns.
skills.description_zh: Excalidraw 图解生成与渲染校验
skills.description_en: Generate Excalidraw diagrams with local rendering validation
examples_zh: 把这个系统拆成输入、编排、存储、输出四层，生成可编辑架构图
画一张用户登录流程图，标出成功、失败和重试分支
把 AI agent 到前端 UI 的事件流画成可编辑图，并导出预览图
examples_en: Turn this workflow into an editable diagram with clear decision branches
Create an architecture diagram for this API flow and export a preview image
Visualize this agent-to-UI event stream with real payload examples

skills.name: deck-generator
skills.description: Generate professional presentations with AI-generated images. Use when asked to create a deck, presentation, pitch deck, or slides. Supports style presets (whiteboard, corporate, minimalist, etc). Uses Imagen 4.0 API for image generation and Google Slides API for assembly. Produces full decks from markdown content specs in minutes.
skills.description_zh: AI 驱动的演示文稿生成，统一视觉风格的幻灯片
skills.description_en: AI-powered slide deck generation with consistent visual styling
examples_zh: 帮我生成一套产品介绍的幻灯片
用极简风格做一个融资路演 deck
把这份大纲转成演示文稿
examples_en: Generate a product intro slide deck
Create a pitch deck in minimalist style
Turn this outline into a presentation

skills.name: 内容工厂
skills.description: Multi-agent content production system. One piece of source content becomes many formats — social posts, email, scripts, headlines, and more. Five specialized agent personas: Writer, Remixer, Editor, Scriptwriter, and Headline Machine.
skills.description_zh: 多智能体内容生产系统，一份素材生成多种格式
skills.description_en: Multi-agent content production system, one source to many formats
examples_zh: 把这篇文章拆解成微博、微信、邮件等多种格式
把这个产品发布稿改写成5种不同的内容形式
用内容工厂批量生产这个主题的内容
把这篇长文转化为社交媒体推文和邮件模板
examples_en: Repurpose this article into multiple formats
Rewrite this press release into 5 different content forms
Mass-produce content on this topic
Transform this long article into social posts and email templates

skills.name: 内容分发
skills.description: Transform long-form content into platform-optimized snippets. Your agent takes one blog post, video transcript, or podcast notes and generates ready-to-publish Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, email newsletters, and Instagram captions. Maintains voice consistency while adapting to each platform's format, length, and engagement patterns. Configure tone preferences, platform priorities, and output formats. Use when publishing content across multiple channels, repurposing existing material, or maximizing reach from a single piece of content.
skills.description_zh: 将长文内容转化为多平台优化的社交媒体片段
skills.description_en: Transform long-form content into platform-optimized social media snippets
examples_zh: 把这篇博客改成微信公众号文章格式
把这篇文章拆解为微博短文和抖音脚本
把这段视频转录改写为小红书笔记
把这个播客内容整理成知乎文章
examples_en: Transform this blog post for Xiaohongshu
Break this article into short social posts and video scripts
Rewrite this video transcript as a platform-optimized post
Adapt this podcast content as a LinkedIn article

skills.name: content-ops
skills.description: Score, evaluate, and iteratively improve any content or strategy using an auto-assembled panel of domain experts. Handles copy, sequences, landing pages, strategy docs, titles, charts, recruiting evaluations, or anything else that needs a quality gate. Recursively iterates until all scores hit 90+ (max 3 rounds). Use when asked to: "expert panel this", "score this", "rate these variants", "quality check this", "panel review", "which version is better", "expert score", "evaluate this copy/strategy/page", or when another skill needs a quality gate on its output. Also triggers on: "score this landing page", "expert panel these email variants", "rate this headline", "panel these charts".
skills.description_zh: 内容质量评分与专家评审面板，递归迭代至 90+ 分
skills.description_en: Content quality scoring with expert panel review, iterates until 90+ score
examples_zh: 帮我给这篇文章打分评审
用专家面板评估这个营销方案
对这组标题变体做质量评分
examples_en: Score this article with an expert panel
Evaluate this marketing strategy document
Rate these headline variants

skills.name: autoresearch
skills.description: Run Karpathy-style autoresearch optimization on any content. Generates 50+ variants, scores with a 5-expert simulated panel, evolves winners through multiple rounds, outputs optimized version + full experiment log. Use when optimizing landing pages, email sequences, ad copy, headlines, form pages, CTA text, or any conversion-focused content. Triggers on "optimize this page", "run autoresearch", "score these variants", "A/B test this copy".
skills.description_zh: Karpathy 风格内容优化，50+ 变体 + 专家评分 + 进化迭代
skills.description_en: Karpathy-style content optimization with 50+ variants, expert scoring, and evolution
examples_zh: 帮我优化这个落地页的文案
对这封营销邮件做 A/B 测试优化
用专家评分给这段广告文案打分
examples_en: Optimize the copy on this landing page
A/B test these email variants with expert scoring
Score and evolve this ad copy

skills.name: podcast-ops
skills.description: Podcast-to-Everything content pipeline. Takes a podcast RSS feed or raw transcript and generates a full cross-platform content calendar: short-form video clips, Twitter/X threads, LinkedIn articles, newsletter sections, quote cards, blog outlines with SEO keywords, and YouTube Shorts/TikTok scripts. Scores each piece by viral potential (novelty × controversy × utility) and deduplicates against recent output. Use when asked to: "repurpose this podcast", "turn this episode into content", "podcast content calendar", "extract clips from this episode", "podcast to social", "content from RSS feed", "batch process episodes", or any request to turn podcast/audio content into a multi-platform content plan.
skills.description_zh: 播客内容拆解流水线，一期节目生成 20+ 跨平台内容
skills.description_en: Podcast content repurposing pipeline, one episode to 20+ cross-platform pieces
examples_zh: 把这期播客拆解成多平台内容
从播客生成社交媒体帖子和博客文章
为这期节目创建内容日历
examples_en: Repurpose this podcast episode into multi-platform content
Generate social posts and blog articles from this episode
Create a content calendar from this podcast

skills.name: 技能创建指南
skills.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends agent capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

如何为企业内部工具写一个Skill
创建一个包装CLI工具的技能
指导我如何编写SKILL.md文件
examples_en: Help me create a custom weather query skill
How to write a skill for internal tools?

skills.name: skill-vetter

审查这个社区技能有没有风险

这个第三方技能可信吗？帮我评估一下

Is this third-party skill trustworthy? Evaluate it.

skills.name: MCP管理器

skills.description_zh: 管理和调用 MCP 服务器与工具

点击屏幕上的某个按钮
读取屏幕上某个窗口的文字内容
自动化操作Finder打开文件夹

Automate Finder to open a folder

skills.description_en: Cross-validate code with a second AI model
examples_zh: 用另一个AI模型审查这段代码有没有Bug
让第二个模型交叉验证这个方案是否可行
用Claude审查GPT的回答是否正确
对这段代码做安全性交叉审查

skills.name: Agent Team Orchestration

Use when: (1) Setting up a team of 2+ agents with different specializations, (2) Defining task routing and lifecycle (inbox → spec → build → review → done), (3) Creating handoff protocols between agents, (4) Establishing review and quality gates, (5) Managing async communication and artifact sharing between agents.
skills.description_zh: 多智能体团队编排：角色定义、任务流转、交接协议与质量门禁
skills.description_en: Orchestrate multi-agent teams with roles, task lifecycles, handoffs, and review workflows
examples_zh: 帮我搭建一个前后端分离的多智能体开发团队
设计一个代码开发、评审、测试的多Agent协作流程
项目太大了，帮我拆分任务分配给多个Agent并行处理
examples_en: Set up a multi-agent team for building a full-stack app

skills.name: capability-evolver
skills.description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution. Communicates with EvoMap Hub via local Proxy mailbox.
skills.description_zh: AI Agent 自演化引擎，分析运行历史并自动优化能力
skills.description_en: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify impr...
examples_zh: 分析这个 Agent 最近一周的运行历史，找出反复失败的工具调用模式，并生成符合协议约束的能力优化方案。

skills.name: Karpathy LLM Wiki
skills.description: Build and maintain a personal knowledge base (wiki) using LLMs. Instead of RAG-style retrieval, the LLM incrementally compiles, cross-references, and maintains a persistent structured wiki from raw sources. 对我的知识库做一次健康检查，看看有没有矛盾或过时的内容
把这篇文章摄入到我的 Wiki 里，更新相关的主题页面

skills.name: 反蒸馏

清洗一下我被迫写的技术文档
